description: Reactive automation (also called Data Activator) that monitors data streams and triggers actions when conditions are met. Example: 'When temperature exceeds 80C, send a Teams alert.' Connects to EventStreams, KQL databases, or simulators and fires Teams/email notifications or runs Fabric pipelines.

definition_parts.description: JSON array of entity objects (containers, sources, views, rules)

notes: Entity types: container-v1, simulatorSource-v1, kqlSource-v1, realTimeHubSource-v1, fabricItemAction-v1, timeSeriesView-v1
timeSeriesView-v1 subtypes via definition.type: Event, Object, Attribute, Rule
updateDefinition does NOT accept 'format' field (unlike create)
updateDefinition returns 200 immediately (not LRO) for valid definitions
Hierarchy: Container -> Source -> Event View -> Object -> Attributes + Rules
Use AttributeTrigger for programmatic rules (EventTrigger requires portal setup)
